_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Create comprehensive exploitation strategies that identify exploitable technical or operational vulnerabilities.
reference_document_element_description: Execute security testing for AI systems prior to production deployment, including adversarial robustness testing, prompt injection testing, and supply chain verification.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.490), SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.466).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.0/10 (raw 0.304). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [comprehensive, create, exploitable, exploitation, identify, operational] vs WIDAI-only terms [adversarial, ai, chain, deployment, execute, injection] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.859 (P=0.869, R=0.849). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Create comprehensive exploitation strategies that identify exploitable technical" and "Execute security testing for AI systems prior to production deployment, includin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.498 > STS 0.304 (gap +0.194). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [comprehensive, create, exploitable, exploitation, identify, operational]. WIDAI terms: [adversarial, ai, chain, deployment, execute, injection].
